features: SCENTS FOR EVERY MOOD - This luxurious 10-bottle bath soak set includes 3 Muscle Soak, 1 Muscle Therapy, 2 Feel Relaxed, 2 Feel Blissful, and 2 Feel Pampered. Each scent soothes the body, calms the mind, and turns every bath into a spa-like self-care ritual.

THERAPEUTIC & NATURAL - Each bath soak contains sea sage, black pepper, ginseng, calendula, rose, shea butter, and ginger. These natural ingredients work together to relieve muscle tension, promote relaxation, soften and hydrate skin, and deliver a soothing aromatherapy experience that revitalises both body and mind.

DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED - Radox Muscle Soak is pH-neutral and dermatologically considerate, making it safe and gentle for all skin types. Enjoy a daily bath without irritation while cleansing, hydrating, and leaving skin feeling soft, smooth, and relaxed.

EASY DAILY SELF-CARE - Simply pour under running water, stir for a luxurious bubble bath, and unwind. Ideal for daily use, this bath soak helps reduce muscle tension, relieve stress, and provide a calming spa-like experience in the comfort of your own home.

VALUE PACK - Each 500ml bottle offers plenty of luxurious baths, and the 10-bottle pack allows variety, sharing with friends or family, and long-term self-care. Enjoy a wide selection of soothing scents and indulgent experiences, ensuring value, convenience, and daily moments of relaxation without running out.
description: Product Description Radox Mixed Pack Bath Soak - Pack of 10 x 500ml Bottles Lean back and feel the tension melt away with the Radox Muscle Soak Bath Soak, with Sage and Sea Minerals. Relax and soothe aching muscles with the Radox Muscle Therapy with Black Pepper and Ginseng. Relax with the Radox Feel Relaxed Bath Soak, with Lavender and Waterlily. Moisturise your skin with the Radox Feel Blissful Luxurious Bath Cream, with Calendula and Rose. Indulge in the Radox Feel Pampered Bath Soak, with Shea Butter and Ginger. Inspired by nature's natural fragrances and enriched with natural extracts, leaving skin delightfully fragrant. A mixed pack of 10 x 500ml bottles of Radox Bath Soak 3 x Muscle Soak 1 x Muscle Therapy 2 x Feel Relaxed 2 x Feel Blissful 2 x Feel Pampered Suitable for daily use on all skin types. Dermatologically tested and PH neutral. For best results pour bath soak under running water and unwind to get that relaxing feeling. Use only as directed. Inspired by nature‚Äôs natural ingredients Relax in a bath with our delightfully fragrant bath soak, letting it cleanse your body and relax your senses. Each of Radox bath soak's fragrance combinations is specially designed to unleash a mood, whether you want to be energised or refreshed, uplifted or soothed. Suitable for daily use For all skin types A moment of relaxation for your muscles 100% nature inspired fragrance
